dishes.name: Tandoori Malai Broccoli
dishes.desc: Broccoli florets in a smoky cream-cheese and hung-curd marinade, charred in the tandoor until the edges catch. Mild and creamy with a gentle smokiness, it's a crowd-pleasing vegetarian starter that even non-veg eaters reach for. One portion is generous enough for two to share.

dishes.name: Galouti Kebab
dishes.desc: Melt-in-the-mouth minced mutton kebabs with saffron and warm spice.

dishes.name: Paneer Tikka
dishes.desc: Char-grilled cottage cheese cubes in a spiced yoghurt marinade.

dishes.name: Chicken Tikka
dishes.desc: Boneless chicken char-grilled in a classic tandoori marinade.

dishes.name: Hara Bhara Kebab
dishes.desc: Spinach-and-pea patties, crisp outside and soft within.

dishes.name: Amritsari Fish Tikka
dishes.desc: Carom-spiced fish, golden and flaky from the tandoor.

dishes.name: Tandoori Aloo
dishes.desc: Stuffed baby potatoes roasted in the tandoor — Jain-friendly.

dishes.name: Mutton Seekh Kebab
dishes.desc: Spiced minced-mutton skewers grilled over charcoal.

dishes.name: Dahi ke Kebab
dishes.desc: Delicate hung-curd kebabs, creamy and lightly spiced.

dishes.name: Tandoori Prawns
dishes.desc: Jumbo prawns marinated and seared in the tandoor.

dishes.name: Dal Vermillion
dishes.desc: Whole black lentils simmered overnight with tomato, butter and a touch of cream for a velvety, mildly spiced dal. Rich and comforting, it pairs beautifully with naan or rice. A classic that anchors almost any Indian spread.

dishes.name: Butter Chicken
dishes.desc: Tandoori chicken in a silky tomato-and-butter gravy finished with cream and dried fenugreek. Mildly sweet, rich and universally loved — the dish most tables order. One portion comfortably serves two with bread.

dishes.name: Paneer Lababdar
dishes.desc: Soft paneer in a rich cashew-tomato gravy.

dishes.name: Rogan Josh
dishes.desc: Slow-cooked lamb in a Kashmiri chilli and yoghurt gravy.

dishes.name: Kadai Paneer
dishes.desc: Paneer tossed with peppers in a robust kadai masala.

dishes.name: Chicken Chettinad
dishes.desc: Fiery South-Indian chicken with pepper and curry leaf.

dishes.name: Palak Paneer
dishes.desc: Cottage cheese in a smooth spinach gravy.

dishes.name: Jain Paneer Butter Masala
dishes.desc: Classic butter masala prepared Jain — no onion or garlic.

dishes.name: Mutton Rogan Curry
dishes.desc: Home-style mutton curry, deeply spiced and slow-cooked.

dishes.name: Malai Kofta
dishes.desc: Soft koftas in a mildly sweet cashew-cream gravy.

dishes.name: Prawn Curry
dishes.desc: Coastal prawn curry with coconut and a tang of kokum.

dishes.name: Chana Masala
dishes.desc: Chickpeas in a tangy, spiced onion-tomato gravy.

dishes.name: Assorted Bread Basket
dishes.desc: A warm basket of butter naan, tandoori roti and flaky laccha paratha — the classic accompaniment to soak up rich curries and gravies. Mild and comforting, it serves a small table.

dishes.name: Garlic Naan
dishes.desc: Soft, pillowy naan brushed with garlic and butter, baked in the tandoor until just blistered. The everyday bread that goes with everything on the table.

dishes.name: Hyderabadi Veg Biryani
dishes.desc: Fragrant dum biryani layered with vegetables and saffron.

dishes.name: Hyderabadi Chicken Biryani
dishes.desc: Slow-cooked dum biryani with marinated chicken.

dishes.name: Mutton Biryani
dishes.desc: Royal mutton dum biryani, rich and aromatic.

dishes.name: Jeera Rice
dishes.desc: Steamed basmati tempered with cumin.

dishes.name: Saffron Pista Kulfi
dishes.desc: Slow-churned saffron kulfi studded with crushed pistachio, denser and creamier than ice cream. Fragrant, lightly sweet and cooling — a fitting finish to a spiced meal. Served as two pieces per portion.

dishes.name: Gulab Jamun
dishes.desc: Warm milk dumplings soaked in cardamom syrup.

dishes.name: Gajar Ka Halwa
dishes.desc: Slow-cooked carrot halwa finished with ghee and nuts.

dishes.name: Rasmalai
dishes.desc: Soft cottage-cheese discs in saffron-cardamom milk.

dishes.name: Crispy Corn Chilli
dishes.desc: Golden corn tossed with peppers and a sweet-chilli glaze.

dishes.name: Chilli Paneer
dishes.desc: Crispy paneer in a fiery indo-chinese sauce.

dishes.name: Chilli Chicken
dishes.desc: Wok-tossed chicken in a hot garlic-chilli sauce.

dishes.name: Veg Spring Rolls
dishes.desc: Crisp rolls packed with shredded vegetables.

dishes.name: Crispy Lamb
dishes.desc: Shredded lamb fried crisp in a sweet-hot glaze.

dishes.name: Chicken Lollipop

dishes.name: Honey Chilli Potato

dishes.name: Darsaan with Ice Cream

dishes.desc: Crisp, chilled draught lager.

dishes.desc: Smooth premium imported lager.

dishes.desc: Cloudy, citrusy wheat beer.

dishes.desc: Hoppy, aromatic India Pale Ale.

dishes.desc: Dark, full-bodied stout with roasted notes.

dishes.name: Cider (Pint)
dishes.desc: Crisp, lightly sweet apple cider.

dishes.name: House Red Wine (Glass)
dishes.desc: A smooth, medium-bodied red.

dishes.name: House White Wine (Glass)
dishes.desc: A crisp, chilled white.

dishes.name: Rosé Wine (Glass)
dishes.desc: Light, refreshing dry rosé.

dishes.name: Sparkling Wine (Glass)
dishes.desc: Light, celebratory sparkling wine.

dishes.name: Red Wine (Bottle)
dishes.desc: A full bottle of our house red to share.

dishes.name: Chocolate Brownie with Ice Cream
dishes.desc: Warm fudgy walnut brownie served with a scoop of vanilla ice cream and a chocolate drizzle. The classic warm-and-cold dessert; kids and adults both love it.

dishes.name: Gajar Halwa with Rabri
dishes.desc: Slow-cooked carrot halwa in ghee, finished with reduced milk rabri and cashews. Warm, rich and traditional — a winter favourite that serves two.

dishes.name: Fresh Fruit Platter
dishes.desc: A bright plate of seasonal fresh fruit with a squeeze of lime and mint. The lightest way to end a meal — refreshing, allergen-free and good for sharing.

dishes.name: Kesar Phirni
dishes.desc: Chilled ground-rice pudding set with saffron and milk, topped with almonds. Creamy, fragrant and gently sweet — served in a small earthen bowl for one.

dishes.name: Sizzling Chocolate Pizza
dishes.desc: A dessert pizza of warm chocolate, marshmallow and nuts served sizzling on a hot plate. Theatrical and indulgent — built for two to dig into together.

dishes.name: Kadai Mushroom
dishes.desc: Mushrooms and peppers tossed in a robust freshly-ground kadai masala. Bold, peppery and dry-ish — a punchy vegan-friendly main for those who like heat. Serves two.

dishes.name: Vegetable Hakka Noodles
dishes.desc: Wok-tossed noodles with julienned vegetables and soy in classic Indo-Chinese style. Comforting and shareable, a table staple alongside any gravy. Serves two.

dishes.name: Grilled Lamb Chops
dishes.desc: Four French-trimmed lamb chops marinated in rosemary and garlic, grilled to a blushing medium. Tender and full-flavoured — a premium plate for one serious eater.

dishes.name: Crispy Corn Kernels
dishes.desc: Sweet corn kernels fried crisp and tossed with pepper and curry leaf. Crunchy, moreish and easy to share around the table while you decide on mains.

dishes.name: Bruschetta al Pomodoro
dishes.desc: Toasted bread topped with marinated tomato, basil and olive oil. Light and fresh — a clean opener before a heavier main. Four pieces per plate.
